case_title: MCCOWN & EVANS, LLP VS. XERCEO, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCCOWN & EVANS, LLP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XERCEO, INC. $2,808.00 PRINCIPAL, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,917.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-23-2009 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCOWN & EVANS, LLP AS TO DEFENDANT XERCEO, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-14-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT XERCEO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-23-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-23-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTEE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
